    Siemens Xcelerator

    Siemens Xcelerator will make it easier than ever before to navigate digital and sustainable transformation – faster and at scale.

    Find out more
  1. Home

Audi is virtualizing the shop floor with virtual PLC

Reducing the variety and number of devices and converting applications to software to make production faster, more robust and more flexible—Audi’s goal was to virtualize shop floor automation.

Use caseView product

Decoding the future of energy

With our innovative grid software and consultancy services, we pave the way for prosumer-centric, autonomous grid management and help transmission and distribution grid operators transform their grids.

View product

Guarding the plant: Robot dogs improve safety

By using a robot version of man’s best friend, process industries can enhance worker safety and improve maintenance work.

Upgrade reality

The challenges of tomorrow demand an upgrade today. We power your ideas with artificial intelligence, simulation and smart technologies, moving you from digital blueprint to real-world impact.

Select...Artificial intelligence
Artificial intelligence
all

Using AI to save water

Swedish water company VA SYD brought down its volume of non-revenue water from 10% to less than 8%. How? By using an AI-based solution to detect leaks as small as 0.5 liters per second.

Read customer story
Webinar
all

A practical demo to reduce water loss

How can the water and wastewater industries learn from other sectors to leapfrog the hurdles in deploying simulation and AI?

Watch now
Product spotlight
all

Reduce non-revenue water by up to 50%

About 30% of drinking water is lost on its way to consumers. Discover how artificial intelligence can make leak detection smarter and improve meter data management.

Get started

Digital twin
all

The digital-first recreational vehicle

Hymer designs and manufactures camper vans and motor homes for all needs. For its new flagship Venture S camper van, Hymer used Siemens Xcelerator software portfolio elements, including Solid Edge and NX.

Read customer story
White paper
all

The digital twin: Beyond a CAD model

A digital twin is more than just a CAD model. It is a living entity that is extended, completed and updated throughout the asset’s lifecycle, further enriched with data obtained during the asset’s operation.

Siemens Xcelerator

Building X

The Building X platform helps you manage and optimize building operations—from energy use and tenant comfort to maintenance, security, safety and more.

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

Electrification X

Electrification X combines the real and digital worlds in the Xcelerator Internet of Things (IoT) software as a service (SaaS) offering for electrification and automation to tackle the challenges of energy transition.

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

Femap

Create, edit and evaluate finite element models of complex products and systems using advanced computer-aided engineering (CAE) pre- and postprocessors to model components, assemblies or systems.

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

Gridscale X

Accelerate and secure the energy transition in a sustainable and profitable way.

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

Movilitas Cloud

Achieve end-to-end traceability with our powerful serialization software, automating serial number management and streamlining your manufacturing processes to ensure compliance and build a robust supply chain.

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

NX X

NX software helps designers and manufacturers deliver better products faster using powerful, integrated computer-aided design (CAD) and computer-aided manufacturing (CAM) solutions that realize the full value of the digital twin.

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

Software assurance with Sigrid

Imagine effortlessly navigating your software portfolio while connecting teams, tools and technologies. 

Learn more
Siemens Xcelerator

Solid Edge X for design

Solid Edge software delivered in a secure software-as-a-service (SaaS) environment.

Learn more

Teamcenter medical device solution

The ultimate product lifecycle management (PLM) add-on module for Siemens Teamcenter, specifically designed for medical technology companies.

News

News and breakthroughs

Explore today's headlines, major partnerships and transformative breakthroughs. This is your front-row seat to the technology and expert insights that are actively engineering a more sustainable and intelligent future.

Amberg, Germany
all

Siemens to invest over €200 million to build a factory

A new AI-driven, digitalized factory will be built in Amberg by 2030 to modernize manufacturing and meet rising demand for high-tech electronic products and increase the flexibility of itsfuture manufacturing operations.

all

Annual Shareholders' Meeting 2026

Siemens has held its Annual Shareholders' Meeting on February 12, 2026 and released our first quarter results for fiscal year 2026.  

all

Siemens Nanjing facility named WEF "Lighthouse"

Our digital factory in Nanjing has been named a "Lighthouse" by the World Economic Forum, recognizing its leadership in applying Fourth Industrial Revolution technologies like artificial intelligence and data analytics. 

Press
all

Siemens and NVIDIA expand partnership

We are expanding our partnership with NVIDIA to build the industrial metaverse. Together, we are reinventing the entire end-to-end industrial value chain.

all

Siemens & Stadler deliver automated Copenhagen trains

A Siemens and Stadler consortium will deliver 226 fully automated (GoA4) trains for S-Bane Copenhagen. This landmark project will create the world's largest automated railway system, boosting capacity for millions of new journeys.

all

Siemens Mobility leads in EU taxonomy results

Siemens Mobility reports its best-ever EU Taxonomy result, with 87% of revenue now Taxonomy-aligned. This externally audited figure confirms our leadership in sustainable mobility.
